entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop (Pennisetum americanum) used to evaluate the efficacy of metalaxyl seed treatments.

entities.name: METALAXYL
entities.description: A fungicide formulation applied as a seed treatment to control downy mildew.

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease that affects pearl millet cultivars with varying levels of susceptibility.

entities.name: GERMINATION
entities.description: A plant growth parameter that was significantly reduced at higher rates of fungicide application.

entities.name: EMERGENCE
entities.description: A plant growth parameter that was reduced in one of the four pearl millet cultivars.

entities.name: TIME OF FLOWERING
entities.description: A phenological parameter tested for response to metalaxyl seed treatment.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A productivity parameter that showed significant increases in the most susceptible cultivars treated with metalaxyl.

entities.name: SEED TREATMENT
entities.description: The process of applying fungicide formulations to seeds to control diseases.
